problem: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Can electromagnetic fields generate sustained thrust without propellant — EmDrive physics remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Plasma. Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
